# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: my-application-service-account
  type: gcp-types/iam-v1:projects.serviceAccounts
  properties:
    accountId: my-app-sa-ext # Must be unique within the project and <= 30 characters
    displayName: Service Account for External Application
    projectId: $(project)

- name: my-application-service-account-key
  type: gcp-types/iam-v1:projects.serviceAccounts.keys
  properties:
    serviceAccountName: projects/$(project)/serviceAccounts/$(ref.my-application-service-account.email)
    privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE # This ensures the generated key is a JSON file compatible with client libraries
    keyAlgorithm: KEY_ALG_RSA_2048 # Recommended key algorithm

outputs:
- name: serviceAccountEmail
  value: $(ref.my-application-service-account.email)
- name: serviceAccountKeyId
  value: $(ref.my-application-service-account-key.name)
- name: serviceAccountKeyJson # This output contains the full JSON key file content (decoded)
  value: $(dm:decode "$(ref.my-application-service-account-key.privateKeyData)" "BASE64")
